characters.name: Bella
characters.description: Bella is a sweet little girl who loves to spend time with her friends atMelon Patch Academy. She was voiced by Ava Madison Gray from 2019-2022, and Skye Fayerman since 2023.  Bella comes off as shy in the beginning, but she learns to open up and her personality shows more. She’s funny, imaginative, and caring. She loves to paint and draw and her favorite color is purple. She gets nervous when she realizes there’s some things she thinks she can’t do (like jumprope), but when she gave it a try, she found herself enjoying it and learning to give things a try even when you think you can’t do it. In Cocomelon Lane, it is revealed that Bella gets nervous whenever she is away from her mother.

characters.name: Cece
characters.description: Cece is a supporting character in Cocomelon. She is voiced by Hannah An in 2019, and Alice Cho since 2020.ugly looking babyCece in "Field Day Song"Basic InformationFirst AppearanceJanuary 29, 2019Last AppearanceTBAGenderFemalePhysical InformationSpeciesHuman  As seen in "Hello Song," Cece can be shy, but she quickly gets used to her new class. Her favorite color is pink, and she loves kittens. Cece is shown to be the sweetest of all the characters; she's sweet and kind to Ms. Appleberry and her classmates. She is always shown to be twirling any moment she feels happiest,

characters.name: Characters
characters.description: These animals live with the human characters of Cocomelon. It is unclear whether these animals are real or exist in J.J.'s imagination. They often appear alongside J.J. and his family, engaging in human activities like dancing and playing sports. In other videos, they act out well-known nursery rhymes and fairy tales.

characters.name: Grandpa
characters.description: Grandpais one of the main characters ofCocomelon. He is a farmer who operates a family farm with many animals. Rumors say his name is Ethan but his name is actually Ernest. He is in his late 50's.[1]

characters.name: J.J.
characters.description: J.Jis the youngest in the CoComelon family. He is around the age of two or three years old. His day and year of birth have no correction year; it's speculated that he was born around 2016-2017.   He has ice cream like hair and has many different outfits.  J.J Smith  has hobbies of coloring, playing with his siblings and parents, playing peek-a-boo, eating fruit and vegetables, along with playing at the Coomelon park. In J.J's animal time he wears a green onesie with different animals on it.J.J.V1V2Basic InformationAge2-37-8 (if is real life)GenderMalePhysical InformationSpeciesHuman 7-8 (if is real life)  J.J is a cheerful, and kind kid who is willing to learn something new everyday.
characters.personality_section: J.J is a cheerful, and kind kid who is willing to learn something new everyday.

characters.name: Jay Jeon
characters.description: Creator or CoComelon Jay Jeon, born in 1959 in Seoul, South Korea, is the visionary behind CoComelon, the YouTube sensation. Armed with a B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication from Sung Kyun Kwan University, he has had a rich history in the world of media and film. In the early '80s, Jay co-founded the East-West Film Group as part of the Goethe Institute, where they focused on creating progressive films that shed light on important societal movements. With an impressive net worth of $460 million US dollars, Jay Jeon's journey led him to establish CoComelon. This iconic YouTube channel, which now boasts over 167 million subscribers, began as a humble project in Orange County, California, initiated by a local couple who sought to entertain their sons by creating short animated videos. Jay Jeon, the founder of Treasure Studio, Inc., played a pivotal role in nurturing this hobby into the global phenomenon that is CoComelon.
